title: Connection Setup
descriptionPaired: View and manage your Harmony Link connection settings.
descriptionUnpaired: Connect your app to Harmony Link to sync characters, messages, and configurations across devices.
waitingApproval: Waiting for approval on Harmony Link...
connectionRejectedToast: Harmony Link rejected the connection request
connectionRejectedAlert: Harmony Link rejected the connection request. Please try again or check device approval settings on Harmony Link.
connectionFailedToast: Failed to connect to Harmony Link
connectionFailedAlert: Failed to connect to Harmony Link. Please check the IP address and port, and ensure Harmony Link is running.
unpairMessage: This will remove all pairing data. You will need to pair again to sync with Harmony Link.
inputError: Please enter both URL and Port
securityModeFailed: Failed to connect with selected security mode
resetSecurityMessage: This will clear your security preference and you will be prompted to choose a connection method on next connection attempt.
noServerUrl: No server URL saved for encrypted connection
noWSUrl: No WS URL available for unencrypted connection
